response.justification: Candidate brings 13+ years of polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems, with relevant exposure to high-throughput infrastructure at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic and software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based). However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing frameworks, or growth/measurement systems — the core focus of this Principal IC6 role. Title history (Senior/Staff) and scope of cross-team platform leadership also fall short of Principal-level expectations for owning multi-workstream growth initiatives.
strengths: Strong polyglot fundamentals (TS, Node, C/C++, Java, DLang) with low-latency, high-throughput service experience at Sociomantic
Demonstrated craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus teaching/workshop track record
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing systemic design and long-term ownership
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, metrics/guardrails, or rollout automation
Career trajectory tops out at Staff; lacks evidence of Principal/IC6-scope cross-org technical leadership
Limited signal on data science partnership, statistical analysis, or bias/quality detection in experiments

key_factors.factor: Polyglot engineering depth and scale experience
